info.title: Household Expense Tracker
info.description: Track rent, utilities, meals, and shared expenses fairly.

get.description: Return whether first-run setup is still needed.

post.description:
Create the first household and admin user atomically.

Returns 409 if setup has already been completed — callers should redirect
to /auth/login instead.  No audit log entry is written here because there
is no user_id to attribute the action to before this endpoint succeeds.

items_json.title: Items Json
items_json.description: JSON array of items. Each item: {"name": str, "price": "decimal", "quantity": "decimal", "category": "meal|household|personal", "target_user_id": int|null (required iff category=personal)}

MealLogUpsert.title: MealLogUpsert
MealLogUpsert.description: Single entry for bulk upsert. user_id + log_date is the unique key.
